name: spec-superflow
description: Spec-first workflow that bridges OpenSpec-style planning and Superpowers-style execution discipline.

interface.longDescription: A self-contained Codex workflow plugin with nine skills for intent exploration, planning artifacts, execution contracts, TDD execution, review gates, systematic debugging, closure, and delta spec sync.
defaultPrompt: Use workflow-start to start a new change.
Bridge the approved plan into an execution contract.
